ageGate.question: Are you 21 or older?
ageGate.declineHeading: Mariposa is for those of legal smoking age.
ageGate.declineBody: Come back when the years are on your side.

footer.brandLine: Don't wait for special occasions. Create them.
footer.responsibleLine: You must be 21 or older to enjoy Mariposa. Please smoke responsibly.
